{{Infobox character
| name = Winter Sage
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|sword skill}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, precisely timed attacks}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Sage]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, [[Frozen Blade|Sage of the Frozen Blade]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|teacher, combatant}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Ghostwater (novel)|Ghostwater]]
}}

''See also: [[Winter Sage Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Min Shuei]], also known as the Winter [[Sage]] or the [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]], is a powerful martial artist and a member of the [[Sages]]. She possesses long white hair and utilizes a massive [[Forged sword]] that features a core of [[wintersteel]]. In combat, she demonstrates mastery over ice and frost, employing techniques that can freeze her surroundings, create blizzards of razor-sharp ice, and manipulate snowflakes as conduits for [[sword madra]]. Her abilities are linked to the authority of the [[Winter Icon]], and she can manifest a halo during battle. As a [[Sage]], she possesses significant spiritual power and control, capable of flying at high speeds using her [[Archlord]]-level [[soulfire]]. Despite her immense strength, she is depicted as a highly emotional individual, experiencing intense rage, grief, and awe. She has a complex relationship with [[Yerin]], acting as a mentor or elder figure who has previously been involved in [[Yerin]]'s training. [[Min Shuei]] is also noted for her knowledge regarding the truth of the [[Monarchs]] and has been a key figure in defending against threats like the [[Dreadgods]].}}

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The horned man asks who is backing the [[Skysworn]], suggesting the [[Winter Sage]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Winter Sage]] is furious.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Winter Sage]] is the [[Sage]] of the [[Frozen Blade]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10">''Uncrowned'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Winter Sage]] brought the [[Blackflame Empire]] team back.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c10" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|A woman with long white hair, the Winter [[Sage]] is a [[Sage]] who serves as a symbol of ice and cold while reflecting the [[Sword Icon]]. After choosing [[Yerin]] as her pupil, she moved the girl to the [[Iron guest housing]] and provided training that focused on raw strength and [[sword]] skill rather than specific techniques. Throughout this mentorship, she expressed fury regarding the parasite within [[Yerin]] and intended to seal it, even intervening by shoving the [[Blood Sage]] away to protect her. During their training sessions, she predicted [[Calan Archer]]'s movements and eventually sparred against [[Yerin]] and her [[Blood Shadow]]. Ultimately, she guided [[Yerin]] toward becoming a symbol of swordsmanship to reach the [[Sword Icon]], which she views as a state of mind and a connection to greater power.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">25</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] chose [[Yerin]] as a pupil.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] has long white hair and spoke to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is a woman who found [[Yerin]] and moved her to the [[Iron guest housing]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is a [[Sage]] who provides training.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is a [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is a symbol of ice and cold.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] also reflects the [[Sword Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is a character who expressed fury and disgust regarding the parasite within [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] once fought a battle against the [[Herald of the Tidewalker Sect]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] told [[Yerin]] that the [[Remnant]] had become something else over time.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] wants [[Yerin]] to become a symbol of swordsmanship to get closer to the [[Sword Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is described as not being tolerant and currently distracted.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] left advancement resources for [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] is training with the [[Winter Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] predicted [[Calan Archer]] would move behind [[Yerin]] using a [[spatial transfer]] artifact.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] intends to seal the thing inside [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] expressed relief that the hosts should have warned them.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is one of the [[Sages]] guiding [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] shoved the [[Blood Sage]] away from [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] uses raw strength and [[sword]] skill instead of techniques.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is present during the training discussion.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] trained against [[Yerin]] and her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] whispered congratulations to [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] believes an [[Icon]] is a connection to greater power and a state of mind.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] is pinning [[Yerin]] in place.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Winter Sage]] might be able to fix the [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Winter Sage]] is depicted in a portrait within the [[Sword Sage]]'s [[void]] space.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Winter Sage]] is a teacher.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Winter Sage]] is a combatant who stands on a levitating [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c15">''Dreadgod'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Winter Sage]] was cloaked in a hailstorm of razor-sharp ice and wore a halo matching her white hair.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Winter Sage]] was shuddering.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Winter Sage]] is at [[Charity]]'s side.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10">''Waybound'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Winter Sage]] fights in the snow-capped passage on top of [[Mount Samara]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Winter Sage]] is known for precisely timed attacks.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Winter Sage]] is a weeping entity that flew out of [[Lindon's void key]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c37">''Waybound'', chapter 37</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“We will have our own accounting,” the Winter Sage said, her voice furious.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Winter Sage had been sending her out to fight with her sword, insisting that this would help her become a “symbol” of swordsmanship and thus get closer to the Sword Icon.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“…and we’ll have to seal that thing,” the Winter Sage spat.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Winter Sage took a deep, relieved breath. “They should have warned us!”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Congratulations,” the Winter Sage whispered.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
